title: PantrySwipe
description: Title slide — AI kitchen companion, seeking Technical Co-Founder

title: The Problem
description: 130k tonnes food waste, SGD 258/month per household, recipe apps miss the point

title: The Solution
description: Tinder-style swipe deck, pantry match score, AI Chef, expiry tracking

title: App in Action
description: Live app — iOS and Android, 8 features shipped, phone mockup

title: Market Opportunity
description: 1.4M SG households, SGD 2.1B sector, USD 34B SEA food tech by 2027

title: Revenue Model
description: SGD 4.99/mo subscription + grocery affiliate, sponsored recipes, B2B white-label

title: Traction
description: Production app, 8 features, RevenueCat IAP live, seeking CTO co-founder

title: What We're Building Next
description: CV scanner, receipt OCR, ML ranking, backend API + push notifications

title: Why Now
description: 61% home cooking, GenAI margins viable, no dominant SEA player

title: Let's Build Together
description: Co-founder pitch, equity open, contact details
